name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram at 505 SW 8th St in Miami, FL offers check cashing and money transfer services in the heart of downtown.
description_long:
MoneyGram's location at 505 SW 8th Street in Miami, FL sits in the Buena Vista neighborhood, just off the main commercial corridor. Open Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, with Saturday hours from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM, this standalone facility serves downtown Miami residents and workers. The convenient hours make it accessible before or after work.

At this Miami location, you can send and receive money transfers, cash checks, and access other financial services. For more information about specific services available at the 505 SW 8th St branch in Miami, FL, call +1 305-856-2211 during business hours. The knowledgeable staff can answer questions about fees, processing times, and accepted forms of payment.

If you need to cash a check or send money in Miami, bring a valid government-issued ID and any relevant documents for your transaction. This downtown Miami location is especially convenient for those working or living in the urban core. Visit during posted hours to access quick, reliable financial services.
pros: 88+ locations across Miami provide extensive geographic coverage and accessibility
Extended hours through CVS partners (many open until 11 PM or 11:59 PM) enable after-hours access
Dual online and offline service options allow flexibility in how customers conduct transfers
Partnership model with supermarkets and multiservice centers serves diverse neighborhoods including lower-income areas
No requirement to maintain separate account—pay-as-you-go transaction model
Established brand with global money transfer network for international remittances
Multiple location types (pharmacies, supermarkets, independent agencies) reduce travel time for most customers
cons: Service quality and hours entirely dependent on partner retailers, with no guarantee of consistency
Website provides no pricing information, fees, or exchange rates—complete opacity on costs
Physical transfer still requires visiting a location; online option details not explained on location page
No credit-building benefits—purely transactional with no account history reporting
Limited to money movement and basic services; cannot address underlying financial challenges
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing to send/receive money without a bank account
International immigrants or travelers sending remittances home
Customers needing immediate check cashing or money orders without bank delays
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in Miami who need quick money transfers, check cashing, or money orders without maintaining a bank account. The primary caveat is complete pricing opacity—fees, exchange rates, and transfer costs are not disclosed on their website, making it impossible to compare value before transacting.
services: Retail partner network access (CVS, supermarkets, independent agencies)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 505 SW 8th St, Miami, FL. Check cashing and money transfers in downtown Miami.
